'''Drelosyn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout trooper]] [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]].<ref name="Episode VI" />

==Biography==
Born on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Drelosyn raced [[Swoop/Legends|swoops]] in the underworld of [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]], honing his [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] skills. Prior to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], he joined the Empire's Stormtrooper Corps and rose to the rank of Corporal,<ref name="CCG Drelosyn" /> eventually being assigned to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], the construction site of the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]]. He was partnered with scout trooper Corporal [[Misik]] and tasked with patrolling the moon on [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]] for threats to the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Endor shield generator bunker|shield generator bunker]].<ref name="Episode VI" /> While on Endor, he continued developing his piloting skills.<ref name="CCG Drelosyn" />

In 4 ABY, a [[Endor strike team/Legends|Rebel strike team]] landed on the moon and were spotted by scout trooper [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Barich]] and his partner, who rode off on their speeder bikes to get help. Rebels [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] chased after them on their own bike. After Skywalker took out Barich's partner and acquired his bike for himself, Barich rode past Drelosyn and Misik, who followed behind the Rebels and shot at them. Skywalker broke off from Organa to deal with the two other troopers, breaking and ending up behind them. He used his bike to shoot Drelosyn, whose bike crashed into a tree and exploded, killing him.<ref name="Episode VI" />

==Equipment==
Drelosyn wore the standard [[Scout trooper armor/Legends|armor]] and [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] given to scout troopers. He rode a [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bike]].<ref name="Episode VI" />
